item.title: QRit [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: QRit [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
QRit
(Internet Apps)
With QRit you can create awesome QR codes, you can change the background and foreground color to help you integrate them in any place.

[read more]

item.title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:author: detlev
item.itunes:summary:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.description:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]

item.title: Professional File Restoration Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Professional File Restoration Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ntfsfilerecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Professional File Restoration Tool
(Utilities)
Is it possible to regain deleted multimedia files from mistakenly formatted removable storage media? Download cost effective and award winning Files Recovery Software that empowers user to get back whole misplaced data from major data loss incidents like accidental deletion, software/hardware malfunction, disk corruption, booting error, virus/worm infection, improper device usages etc in simplified manner. Affordable data rescue application provides enhanced data scanning facility to easily search and regain all deleted text files, images, audio, video clips, snapshots, office documents etc from accidentally formatted flash storage drive.

[read more]

Affordable data rescue application provides enhanced data scanning facility to easily search and regain all deleted text files, images, audio, video clips, snapshots, office documents etc from accidentally formatted flash storage drive.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Professional File Restoration Tool
(Utilities)
Is it possible to regain deleted multimedia files from mistakenly formatted removable storage media? Download cost effective and award winning Files Recovery Software that empowers user to get back whole misplaced data from major data loss incidents like accidental deletion, software/hardware malfunction, disk corruption, booting error, virus/worm infection, improper device usages etc in simplified manner. Affordable data rescue application provides enhanced data scanning facility to easily search and regain all deleted text files, images, audio, video clips, snapshots, office documents etc from accidentally formatted flash storage drive.

[read more]

item.title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: divverent
item.itunes:summary:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.description:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]

item.title: RED MAGIC GAME LAUNCHER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: RED MAGIC GAME LAUNCHER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
RED MAGIC GAME LAUNCHER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK: Unleash the Power of Gaming on Android! Experience the ultimate gaming performance on your Android device with the Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK. This powerful and intuitive launcher optimizes your gaming experience, offering enhanced graphics, smooth gameplay, and customizable settings. Elevate your gaming sessions with advanced features such as game boosting, performance optimization, and seamless compatibility with a wide range of popular titles. Download the Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK from revWhiteShadow on a gaming adventure like never before!"

[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.

item.title: Nexus Launcher [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Nexus Launcher [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: thre-team
item.itunes:summary:
Nexus Launcher
(Utilities)
(^_^)v
Make it so fun.

After Reboot, goto settings, select Pixel Launcher as default launcher.

For Android 13 and UpsideDownCake only.
Tested on:
LineageOS 20
crDroid 9.5
LMO Droid 4.0
ArrowOS 13.1
Aosp TQ2A
Android UpsideDownCake GSI

Nexus/Pixel Launcher
Apps by Google
Downloaded from ApkMirror.com
https://www.apkmirror.com/apk/google-inc/pixel-launcher/pixel-launcher-13-release/

Google Wallpapers UpsideDownCake
Apps by Google
Downloaded from ApkMirror.com
https://www.apkmirror.com/apk/google-inc/google-wallpaper-picker/google-wallpaper-picker-upsidedowncake-release/
ported from UpsideDownCake to 13.

Pixel Themes UpsideDownCake
Apps by Google
Downloaded from ApkMirror.com
https://www.apkmirror.com/apk/google-inc/pixel-themes/pixel-themes-upsidedowncake-release/
I'm ported from UpsideDownCake to 13.

Nexus Recent || for cange default recent A13
by ThRE Team
Source code
https://github.com/ThRE-Team/Nexus-Recent-A13

Notes:
Lite version: Only launcher and wallpaper.
Full Version; Launcher with more features.
Beta Version: Launcher with more mod.
4Magisk: Instal from Magisk Module.
4Twrp: Install from custom recovery.

by ThRE Team
Enjoy Your Life!!!

[read more]

item.title: Softaken Mail Importer Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Softaken Mail Importer Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: softaken-tools
item.itunes:summary:
Softaken Mail Importer Tool
(Utilities)
To quickly and efficiently import local file types to cloud email servers, use the Softaken Mail Importer program. Multiple local file formats can be converted using our tool's extensive features to send emails from cloud-based email servers. Throughout the conversion process, the email's attributes and data structure are preserved. There are no file size limitations, making it possible to easily upload any local file size to the cloud. This program works with all cloud services, including Office 365. Yahoo, Gmail, etc. All local file extensions, including NSF, PST, MBOX, MSG, EML, OST, etc., can be imported using the software. Additionally, it works with Windows, Lotus Notes, and Outlook editions. Additionally, we provide each customer with a free trial pack that they use to upload a few local files to the cloud. The Mail Importer Tool's Key Features Bulk import of local exe files to the cloud immediately All local file types, including NSF, PST, MBOX, OST, MSG, and EML, are supported. Use all cloud-based email providers, including Gmail, Office 365, Yahoo, Horde, etc. Works with all versions of Lotus Notes and Windows Outlook. Keep the integrity of your data and all email properties. All users can use a free trial version for convenience.
Visit Here:- https://www.softaken.com/mail-importer
[read more]
item.description:
Softaken Mail Importer Tool
(Utilities)
To quickly and efficiently import local file types to cloud email servers, use the Softaken Mail Importer program. Multiple local file formats can be converted using our tool's extensive features to send emails from cloud-based email servers. Throughout the conversion process, the email's attributes and data structure are preserved. There are no file size limitations, making it possible to easily upload any local file size to the cloud. This program works with all cloud services, including Office 365. Yahoo, Gmail, etc. All local file extensions, including NSF, PST, MBOX, MSG, EML, OST, etc., can be imported using the software. Additionally, it works with Windows, Lotus Notes, and Outlook editions. Additionally, we provide each customer with a free trial pack that they use to upload a few local files to the cloud. The Mail Importer Tool's Key Features Bulk import of local exe files to the cloud immediately All local file types, including NSF, PST, MBOX, OST, MSG, and EML, are supported. Use all cloud-based email providers, including Gmail, Office 365, Yahoo, Horde, etc. Works with all versions of Lotus Notes and Windows Outlook. Keep the integrity of your data and all email properties. All users can use a free trial version for convenience.
Visit Here:- https://www.softaken.com/mail-importer
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Softaken Mail Importer Tool
(Utilities)
To quickly and efficiently import local file types to cloud email servers, use the Softaken Mail Importer program. Multiple local file formats can be converted using our tool's extensive features to send emails from cloud-based email servers. Throughout the conversion process, the email's attributes and data structure are preserved. There are no file size limitations, making it possible to easily upload any local file size to the cloud. This program works with all cloud services, including Office 365. Yahoo, Gmail, etc. All local file extensions, including NSF, PST, MBOX, MSG, EML, OST, etc., can be imported using the software. Additionally, it works with Windows, Lotus Notes, and Outlook editions. Additionally, we provide each customer with a free trial pack that they use to upload a few local files to the cloud. The Mail Importer Tool's Key Features Bulk import of local exe files to the cloud immediately All local file types, including NSF, PST, MBOX, OST, MSG, and EML, are supported. Use all cloud-based email providers, including Gmail, Office 365, Yahoo, Horde, etc. Works with all versions of Lotus Notes and Windows Outlook. Keep the integrity of your data and all email properties. All users can use a free trial version for convenience.
Visit Here:- https://www.softaken.com/mail-importer
[read more]

item.title: NTFS Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: NTFS Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverysoftware
item.itunes:summary:
NTFS Data Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Easy to use Drive Recovery Software provides cost effective solution to restore deleted or lost music files, digital pictures, images, snapshots from formatted or unformatted windows NTFS partitioned hard disk. Effective image retrieval software easily recovers deleted or erased crucial digital media files from empty recycle bin. Formatted NTFS file restoration software uses advance disk scanning technique to easily locate and recover accidentally lost or deleted files due to any data lost reasons just in few easy mouse clicks. Easy to download image recover is cost effective and reasonable application in comparison to other available time consuming data recovery application and is available on www.driverecoverysoftware.org with free demo trial version. Windows partitioned data recovery software offers flexible thumbnail preview facility for users to view deleted digital images before their actual recovery. Data drive recovery software is equipped with advanced setting to undelete formatted hard disk files deleted due to any major data lost reasons. Easily downloadable media recovery software can be any used by small and large commercial organizations, professionals to resolve data lost problem without any expert guidance.
[read more]
item.description:
NTFS Data Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Easy to use Drive Recovery Software provides cost effective solution to restore deleted or lost music files, digital pictures, images, snapshots from formatted or unformatted windows NTFS partitioned hard disk. Effective image retrieval software easily recovers deleted or erased crucial digital media files from empty recycle bin. Formatted NTFS file restoration software uses advance disk scanning technique to easily locate and recover accidentally lost or deleted files due to any data lost reasons just in few easy mouse clicks. Easy to download image recover is cost effective and reasonable application in comparison to other available time consuming data recovery application and is available on www.driverecoverysoftware.org with free demo trial version. Windows partitioned data recovery software offers flexible thumbnail preview facility for users to view deleted digital images before their actual recovery. Data drive recovery software is equipped with advanced setting to undelete formatted hard disk files deleted due to any major data lost reasons. Easily downloadable media recovery software can be any used by small and large commercial organizations, professionals to resolve data lost problem without any expert guidance.
[read more]

NTFS Data Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Easy to use Drive Recovery Software provides cost effective solution to restore deleted or lost music files, digital pictures, images, snapshots from formatted or unformatted windows NTFS partitioned hard disk. Effective image retrieval software easily recovers deleted or erased crucial digital media files from empty recycle bin. Formatted NTFS file restoration software uses advance disk scanning technique to easily locate and recover accidentally lost or deleted files due to any data lost reasons just in few easy mouse clicks. Easy to download image recover is cost effective and reasonable application in comparison to other available time consuming data recovery application and is available on www.driverecoverysoftware.org with free demo trial version. Windows partitioned data recovery software offers flexible thumbnail preview facility for users to view deleted digital images before their actual recovery. Data drive recovery software is equipped with advanced setting to undelete formatted hard disk files deleted due to any major data lost reasons. Easily downloadable media recovery software can be any used by small and large commercial organizations, professionals to resolve data lost problem without any expert guidance.
